calendar.matters:
DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Nov-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:43 am and concluding at 9:45 am.

Plaintiff Jamestown Premier GHRSQ, LP. is represented by Roey Rahmil, Esq.
Defendant FANX Inc not appearing.

Christy Dixon is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

This matter was continued to this date for approval of attorneys fees requested.

The Court finds the Attorneys fees to be reasonable.

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Oct-17-2025 Continued To Nov-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Oct-03-2025 Continued To Oct-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Murlene Randle; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:25am and concluding at 9:55am.

Attorney for Plaintiff Roey Ze'Ev Rahmil appeared via zoom.
Witness for Plaintiff Kristi Dixon appeared via zoom.

Andrew Won, an attorney claiming to be for the Defendant Fanx Inc. was present but was not heard as this is a default matter.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

This matter is continued to October 17, 2025 at 9:00am in dept 505 to allow Mr. Rahmil an oppertunity to file an itemized breakdown of the attorney fees related to this matter and to prepare an amended judgment for the court's review.
